use_cases: Form submission and action triggers with multiple visual variants
Navigation triggers with link variant styling
Destructive action confirmation with red variant
Icon-only buttons for compact UI spaces
Accessible button composition via Radix UI Slot
ai_summary: A multi-variant button component from Ruixen UI featuring 6 style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, CVA for variant management, and includes focus, hover, and disabled states with subtle shadows. Note: despite the file name suggesting file-upload functionality, the actual component is a generic Button.
